# A11yAdaptProvider

Apply accessibility adaptations to RenderProgram instruction sequences modifying existing ARIA attributes and injecting new keyboard , focus , and ARIA instructions so that a11y variants become composable program transformations

## Commands

### register
Return static metadata for PluginRegistry . 
 name : A11yAdaptProvider 
 kind : a11y-adapt 
 capabilities : [ aria-modification , aria-injection , keyboard-adapt , focus-adapt ]

### apply
Apply modifications to matching instructions first , then 
 insert additions before the terminal pure instruction . 
 Modifications match on partial instruction patterns and 
 merge new fields . Additions are complete instructions 
 injected into the sequence . Returns the new serialized 
 program and the updated list of applied transforms .

**Arguments:** `$0` **program** (string), `$1` **spec** (string)
